valid.name: add-column
valid.code: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN id_new bigint;

valid.name: alter-default
valid.code: ALTER TABLE users ALTER COLUMN status SET DEFAULT 'active';

invalid.name: alter-type
invalid.code: ALTER TABLE users ALTER COLUMN id TYPE bigint;

errors.message: `ALTER COLUMN ... TYPE` can rewrite the entire table under an ACCESS EXCLUSIVE lock. For non-trivial tables, add a new column, dual-write, backfill, and swap — or use `USING` only for known-safe conversions in a separate migration.
